CNV-66551.summary: virt-handler pods using more memory than expected per cnv_abnormal metric
CNV-66551.description_snippet: cnv_abnormal metric shows escalating memory_working_set_delta_from_request for virt-handler (422625280). container_memory_rss: nodeX 8420933632 (~8.4GB), nodeY 726069248 (~726MB). OCP 4.17.11, CNV 4.17.3.

CNV-71448.description_snippet: virt-handler memory increase with spiky goroutine usage after EUS upgrade OCP 4.18->4.20, CNV 4.18->4.20. Increased memory usage w/ spiky goroutine usage.

CNV-30274.summary: virt-handler memory and cpu usage are hardcoded and set too low for large scale
CNV-30274.description_snippet: Large-scale setup: 132 nodes, 6000 VMs. At 3000 VMs virt-handler consuming 314-329Mi, exceeds requests. Triggers KubeVirtComponentExceedsRequestedMemory alerts. Causes Degraded state in OpenShift Virtualization.

CNV-70607.summary: virt-handler is hotlooping detecting the completion of a migration, node drain is stuck
CNV-70607.description_snippet: virt-handler hot-loops detecting migration completion (migration-target.go:213) thousands of times. Removes Status.EvacuationNodeName preventing new migration, blocking node drain. At scale (10k VMIs). CNV 4.20.

CNV-74568.summary: VM live migration breaks after upgrading the cluster
CNV-74568.description_snippet: Emerald Rapids CPUs: libvirt host-model changed from SapphireRapids to SierraForest after CNV upgrade. Nodes lose SapphireRapids cpu-model-migration label. Destination virt-launcher pod fails to schedule due to missing label.

CNV-71962.summary: VM fails to live migrate from RHCOS10 node to RHCOS9 node in dual stream cluster
CNV-71962.description_snippet: VM on RHCOS10 node cannot live migrate to RHCOS9 node. Fails with: internal error: client socket is closed (virError Code=1, Domain=7). 100% reproducible. CNV 4.21.

CNV-74856.summary: Live migration after workload update fails: guest CPU doesn't match specification: missing features: pdcm
CNV-74856.description_snippet: After CNV upgrade, live migration fails with: operation failed: guest CPU doesn't match specification: missing features: pdcm. Errored virt-launcher pods. CNV 4.19/4.20/4.21.

CNV-76280.summary: Migration failed when migrating VM between hpp and ODF storage
CNV-76280.description_snippet: Migration fails between hostpath-csi-basic and OCS storage. Storage migration causes cephfs/rbd ctrlplugin pods CrashLoopBackOff. Error: pre-creation of storage target for incremental migration of disk not supported. CNV 4.20/4.21.

CNV-74866.summary: virt-handler tight loop on uncompleted migration
CNV-74866.description_snippet: virt-handler and virt-launcher tight-loop monitoring uncompleted migration. High CPU, spamming logs with 'collecting domain stats' and 'Prepared migration target pod'. Node eventually crashed after a day. CNV 4.20.

CNV-69281.summary: parallelMigrationsPerCluster doesn't work in decentralized live migration
CNV-69281.description_snippet: parallelMigrationsPerCluster limit ignored in decentralized live migration. All 7 VMs migrate simultaneously despite HCO limit of 5. Always reproducible. CNV 4.20.

CNV-45516.summary: CNV on top of CNV with external Ceph Storage creates dangling VolumeSnapshots
CNV-45516.description_snippet: OS image imports create dangling VolumeSnapshots without associated PVCs/PVs in virtualization-os-images namespace. Blocks cluster teardown, wastes Ceph storage. Workaround: set dataImportCronSourceFormat: pvc. CNV 4.15/4.16.

CNV-52369.summary: VolumeSnapshot fails for VM disk created on LVM Storage with PVC Volume mode Filesystem
CNV-52369.description_snippet: VolumeSnapshot fails on LVM Storage (topolvm.io) with Filesystem mode. Error: rpc error: code = OutOfRange desc = requested size smaller than source logical volume. 100% reproducible. Use Block volume mode instead. CNV 4.16.

CNV-74930.summary: PVC and VolumeSnapshot behavior when removing default storage class
CNV-74930.description_snippet: Removing default storage class annotation deletes VolumeSnapshots but keeps PVCs. Inconsistent behavior between PVC and VolumeSnapshot lifecycle on storage class change. 100% reproducible. CNV 4.21.

CNV-20450.summary: Migrating VMs get scheduled to cordoned nodes and fail migration testing
CNV-20450.description_snippet: VMs get scheduled to cordoned nodes during migration. 38/279 VMs rescheduled within cordoned zone. Large scale: 117 nodes, 5000 VMs. Regression from 4.9.x. OCP 4.10, CNV 4.10.3.

CNV-75962.summary: kubevirt-migration-controller OOMKilled while scaling up to 4000 VMs
CNV-75962.description_snippet: kubevirt-migration-controller OOMKilled scaling to 4000 VMs. Memory increases linearly with VM count. Default limit 128Mi (later 512Mi) exceeded. Object cache grows unbounded. CNV 4.21. Requests: cpu=100m, memory=64Mi.

CNV-63538.summary: virt-launcher pod consuming more memory than assigned to VM
CNV-63538.description_snippet: virt-launcher consumes 103GiB for VM with 96Gi memory limit. Expected ~97GiB per docs. Overhead exceeds documented calculations (32cpu, 96Gi memory, 1 graphic device, 1 vTPM). 100% reproducible. CNV 4.18.

CNV-70889.summary: kubevirt-csi-controller crashes because CSI resize is not supported
CNV-70889.description_snippet: kubevirt-csi-controller CrashLoopBackOff: csi-resizer container fails with 'CSI driver neither supports controller resize nor node resize'. Hosted cluster with ocs-storagecluster-ceph-rbd storage. OCP 4.18.26, CNV 4.18.17.

OCPBUGS-48789.summary: Servicing fails: Validation of image href for metal3-image-customization-service failed
OCPBUGS-48789.description_snippet: Node servicing fails: Validation of image href http://metal3-image-customization-service failed. In 2-worker clusters when one worker taken offline. metal3-image-customization pod unreachable. OCP 4.18.

OCPBUGS-74962.description_snippet: etcd latency 300-500ms (target <200ms) despite good WAL <10ms, fast disk, 10Gbps network. Router pod restarts from startup probe timeout due to slow external secret loading. Multiple clusters affected. OCP 4.19.

OCPBUGS-69390.summary: Azure disk CSI driver static provision crashed caused by segmentation fault on Azure Stack Hub
OCPBUGS-69390.description_snippet: Azure disk CSI driver crashes with nil pointer dereference in InsertDiskProperties during ControllerPublishVolume. Pod stuck ContainerCreating. Static provisioning with manual PV/PVC on Azure Stack Hub. OCP 4.22.

OCPBUGS-38553.summary: Wrong NODE_IP when multiple ports on-prem
OCPBUGS-38553.description_snippet: Kubelet forced to listen on 0.0.0.0 instead of primary IP when node has multiple ports. baremetal-runtimecfg detects correct IP but MCO overrides to 0.0.0.0. Affects bare metal and hosted clusters. OCP 4.16-4.18.

OCPBUGS-41786.summary: CentOS 8 is EOL - Update Dockerfile to CentOS 9 Stream
OCPBUGS-41786.description_snippet: Update Dockerfile from EOL CentOS 8 to CentOS 9 Stream.

OCPBUGS-42135.summary: Route doc link still points to 4.16 version
OCPBUGS-42135.description_snippet: Route documentation 'Learn more about Route' link points to 4.16 docs instead of current version. OCP 4.17/4.18.

CNV-78575.summary: kubevirt-hyperconverged operator version disappeared from OLM catalog
CNV-78575.description_snippet: kubevirt-hyperconverged operator 4.19.x disappeared from OLM catalog. Only 4.18.28 available. redhat-operator-index catalog image published without 4.19.x versions. Also affects OCP 4.20 catalog.

CNV-78518.summary: REGISTRY_SERVER does not redirect virt-exportserver image pulls in disconnected environments
CNV-78518.description_snippet: virt-exportserver image pulled from registry.redhat.io instead of configured mirror registry. Blocks validation checkup in air-gapped clusters. ImagePullBackOff with 'registry is blocked in registries.conf'. 100% reproducible.

OCPBUGS-74926.summary: In-memory certificate expiration date in oauth-apiserver namespace is too short for ELS
OCPBUGS-74926.description_snippet: In-memory certificate in oauth-apiserver namespace expires after 1 year, not meeting ELS term 2 period. Needs extension to 3 years. Affects OCP 4.14 to 4.19.
